description:
Try to get a good result by saving the marked stones!

 (Big mistakes that somehow manage to save the stones may be marked wrong!)
sgf:
(;FF[4]GM[1]CA[UTF-8]AP[goproblems:0.1.0]SZ[19]ST[0]AB[oq][op][pn][pm][no][po][mo][rn][pl][pk]AW[nq][np][on][oo][pp][qp][om][mm][ol]TR[op]TR[oq](;B[mp];W[or])(;B[mq];W[or])(;B[nr];W[or])(;B[pq](;W[or];B[pr];W[nr];B[rq];W[kq])(;W[qq]C[CHOICE](;B[nr]C[Black will capture something.RIGHT])(;B[qr];W[nr](;B[pr];W[rr];B[rs];W[rq])(;B[or];W[os])))(;W[nr];B[qq])(;W[lp];B[qq]))(;B[pr];W[nr](;B[qr];W[rq];B[rr];W[or];B[pq];W[sr](;B[rs]C[White is dead in the corner.RIGHT])(;B[qo];W[rp](;B[rs]C[At worst, the corner is seki. But white needs to save the outside stones first, so white will probably die in the corner.RIGHT])(;B[sq];W[rs]C[We can do better than ko!])(;B[ro];W[rs]))(;B[rp];W[ro](;B[qo];W[sp];B[qq];W[rp](;B[sn]C[RIGHT])(;B[rs];W[sn]C[Why ko?]))(;B[qq];W[sp](;B[qo];W[rp])(;B[sn]C[RIGHT])))(;B[ro];W[rp](;B[rs]C[RIGHT])(;B[sp];W[rs]C[Black can make a ko or a gote seki (by playing Q1). This technically saves the black stones but is not a good result!]))(;B[sp];W[rp](;B[so];W[rs];B[sq];W[ps]C[Why ko?])(;B[rs];W[so]C[So why did you play T4 exactly? Corner is not a clean kill (might be seki, for example).])))(;B[or];W[qr])(;B[rr];W[qr](;B[qq];W[pq])(;B[qs];W[or])(;B[or];W[pq];B[qs];W[qq]))(;B[rq];W[qr]))(;B[or];W[nr];B[qr];W[qq];B[pr];W[rr];B[rs];W[rq]C[This is a reasonable shape that might be good in similar situations.
